disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dark red-purple spots came up on both lower legs over about 12 hours and do not fade when pressed
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the rash and where it is?
When you press on the spots, do they fade or stay the same colour?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They're dark red to purple spots on both my shins, they came up over the evening, and when I press them they stay the same — they don't go pale.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recovered from a mild upper respiratory tract infection about two weeks before the rash
trigger_question_examples: Have you been unwell or had any infections recently?
Any colds, sore throats or bugs in the last few weeks?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had a bit of a cold, a runny nose, about two weeks ago, but that cleared up on its own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, rigors or feeling systemically unwell
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel hot, feverish or shivery?
Do you feel unwell in yourself, or just worried about the rash?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't feel hot or shivery at all, no fevers — I feel well in myself, I'm just scared about the spots.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No abdominal pain, no vomiting, and urine looks a normal colour to the patient
trigger_question_examples: Any tummy pain, cramping or vomiting?
Have you noticed any change in the colour of your urine — pink, red or cola-coloured?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No tummy pain and I haven't been sick, and my wee looks the normal colour to me.

trigger_question_examples: Any joint pain or swelling, especially in the ankles or knees?
Are you able to walk normally, or are your joints sore?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my joints are completely fine — no aches, no swelling, I can walk normally.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No bleeding from gums or nose, no unusual bruising elsewhere on the body
trigger_question_examples: Any bleeding from your gums or nose, or bruising anywhere else you can't explain?
Have you noticed blood when you brush your teeth, or bruises on other parts of your body?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No bleeding from my gums or nose, and I haven't noticed bruises anywhere except these spots on my legs.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Intense anxiety that the rash represents a life-threatening infection
trigger_question_examples: What is worrying you most about the rash?
Is there something specific you're afraid this might be?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly I'm terrified it's that deadly bacterial infection you hear about — the one where a rash means you're really sick.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No recent NSAID, aspirin or anticoagulant/blood-thinner use
trigger_question_examples: Are you taking any blood thinners, aspirin or anti-inflammatory painkillers?
Have you started any new medicines or supplements recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm not on any blood thinners or regular painkillers, nothing like that.
